articles.title: Ripple insists on deposing former high-ranking SEC official as part of XRP lawsuit
articles.description: Ripple Labs, the blockchain company behind the XRP token that is currently locked in a $1.3 billion legal battle with the United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), has rescheduled the deposition of William Hinman, the SEC’s former director of Division of Corporation Finance, to July 19, according to court filing published last Friday.

articles.title: VeChain Partners With Shopping.io To Enable VET Holders Shop With Vet On Amazon, Ebay, Walmart, And Etsy
articles.description: Shopping.io took to its official Medium to announce its recent partnership with VeChain. The partnership was struck to enable VET holders to shop on Amazon, Ebay, Walmart, and Etsy using their VET coins. VET holders across seven countries will be able to use this feature to shop using their VET coins. Related Reading | Forget Amazon […]

Polygon Teams up With Community Gaming to Provide Scalable eSports Events
articles.description: Polygon has begun collaborating with Community Gaming in order to provide developers the ability to use enhanced scalability when putting together eSports tournaments.

articles.title: The New PancakeSwap on Polygon? DinoSwap Hype Rises Ahead of Launch
articles.description: DinoSwap, a yield farming platform on Polygon, which works similarly as PancakeSwap farming pools, is launching this week. It launches with investments from top DeFi funds, such as Defiance, Hashed, Spartan Group, and DFG, as well as the founder of Polygon, Sandeep Nailwal. Why the Positioning of DinoSwap on Polygon is Unique Polygon has been […]

articles.title: That JPMorgan Report On El Salvador Doesn’t Even Mention The Lightning Network
articles.description: How embarrassing! As more details about JPMorgan ’s “The Bitcoinization of El Salvador” report come to light, the reality of the situation settles. articles.title: Synthetix hits one-month high as SNX rallies 25% ahead of layer 2 exchange launch
articles.description: The SNX/USD exchange reached $13.76 on Monday for the first time since June 3.

articles.title: Polygon and Community Gaming Partner to Provide Scalable Esports Tournaments
articles.description: Polygon has collaborated with Community Gaming to allow developers to take advantage of enhanced scalability while organizing tournaments.

articles.title: Grayscale Digital Large Cap Fund Becomes SEC Reporting Company
articles.description: Grayscale Investments has announced that its Digital Large Cap Fund has become a reporting company, with additional filings for Bitcoin Cash (BCH), Litecoin (LTC), and Ethereum Classic (ETC).

Jed McCaleb Sells 150.7 Million in Past 3 Weeks After Receiving 291.5 Million from Ripple
articles.description: Former Ripple CTO has dumped another 150 million XRP in the past three weeks with half-a-million XRP remaining in his wallet

articles.title: U.S. Lawyer on Chances of the U.S. SEC Going After $ADA, $DOGE, $DOT, and $UNI
articles.description: An American lawyer who has been closely following the lawsuit brought by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) against Ripple Labs over the sale of XRP tokens has weighed in on the fate of several other altcoins. In a recent YouTube video, Jeremy Hogan, a partner at the law firm Hogan & Hogan, shared his […]
